title: brodiaea scabra
intro: Brodiaea scabra, also known as the rough brodiaea or California brodiaea, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family, native to the western coast of North America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of brodiaea scabra include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to alleviate digestive problems. Brodiaea scabra can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it's also used in tincture or salve form to harness its medicinal properties.
